user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view the list of employee notification templates, so that I can see all configured notification types
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Notification Templates screen; When the list loads; Then each row shows the Notification type, Description and Task

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view an individual notification template, so that I can review its content before it is used
acceptance_criteria: Given notification templates are listed; When I click View on a template; Then that template's details are displayed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to page through the notification templates list, so that I can access all 24 templates
acceptance_criteria: Given more templates exist than fit on one page; When I use the pagination controls; Then the next set of templates is shown

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to refresh the notification templates list, so that I always see the latest templates
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Notification Templates screen; When I click Refresh; Then the list reloads
